videos.headline: Rice outlasts Houston in 2OT to grab thrilling win
videos.description: Rice scores a touchdown and two-point conversion in double overtime to beat Houston 45-43.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Rice outlasts Houston in 2OT to grab thrilling win) 2023/09/09 SOTFULL ESHEET
